title: Yoyomod123
description: A cursed mod where you can build your own laptop and download free ram on it :)
body:
![mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7663df060f612a9aa04f0b0599bd26450167566d.png)

### This Mod Requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)!
 
Introducing the Yoyomod! Yoyohappy known as the "virus magnet" 

turned into a joke,and now a minecraft mod!. With this mod,you can collect resources to

craft your computer and download free RAM!

-

**How to _begin_ your journey:**

 -in order to start your journey you must craft a laptop!
 
 -here are the crafting recipes of the laptop and it's parts:

**RAM**

![ram crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52e00e9a4fb980795b88a24f14ba93712c938a13.png)

**CPU**

![cpu crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d12f7b9418745c7e2bbc8585df2834e217837e0b.png)

**Motherboard**

![Motherboard crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/887b6daea09088e37ea3b7fc0f8002c7a2b4d92e.png)

**GPU**

![gpu crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/610903307083eb38617c8081718d73c22ab232be.png)

**Laptop crafting recipe:**

![computer crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a5353036f1c895ebdb395aa1d0da65106531ecd.png)

_After crafting your laptop simply place it on the ground and right click_

_on it to download free ram!_

-

**What happens when you download free ram?**

-I'll leave that for you to find out :)

- 

**The origin of this mod:**

Once upon a time, my friend(yoyohappy123) was known as the "virus magnet" among our 

group of friends. He kept clicking on every suspicious link and downloading

all kinds of sketchy software, thinking he was getting free RAM or some other amazing 

deal.
  
  One day, his computer was completely taken over by viruses(fun fact:he only had 13 fps

on minecraft). It was like a digital apocalypse in there! Pop-up ads, malware.A literal 

virtual war zone.But, I, the tech-savvy hero of the story(pls trust), swooped in to save 

the day. Armed with my super cool ***free*** antivirus software, I bravely 

erased the viruses and restored yoyohappy's computer(mostly).

-

**The making of yoyomod:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-The YoyoHouse

![yoyohouse_cover_eye_candy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa3d714c4d87d49cc74f5b8e1ec5ebbd8b1f587.png)

The yoyohouse in this mod is actually made by yoyohappy himself.He joined my private smp and built this abomination.

-The YoyoBoss Arena

![yoyoboss_arena_cover_eyecandy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40d161f91593bbc5bf04e54434a7ebffcc8eb749.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tMRxZ8cgiao" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The yoyoboss arena unlike the yoyohouse is not inspired by any builds made by yoyohappy,instead it is made from the ground up.

-The Yoyolab

![yoyolab_cover_eyecandy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac1b1873967bea13ae861dc8b44f9afe80217684.png)

the yoyolab is also built from the ground up,it acts as a way to return the overworld if the player is lost in the yoyodimension.

-More coming soon! 👀

</details>

-

**Other crafting recipes:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Block of Tech**

![Block of Tech recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ef5a6531e0021a50a0f46210acaa25c1eb9be64.png)

**Sword of Antivirus**

![Sword of Antivirus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23c399558449acfe79987d9c941726e1c9cc9a35.png)

</details>

-

***Technical details:***

-to get the mod's item via commands use /give neoyoyohapp**p**y:<item>
